case_title: MICHAEL SAMUEL SANDOVAL ET AL VS. JOSIAS AJPOP ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62262285)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) JOSIAS AJPOP OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-08-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ; DECLARATION OF COUNSEL (TRANSACTION ID # 62348322) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, MICHAEL SAMUEL GUZMAN, LIDOSHKA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, MICHAEL SAMUEL GUZMAN, LIDOSHKA AS TO DEFENDANT AJPOP, JOSIAS AJPOP, ADELA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-04-2018
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61657969), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, MICHAEL SAMUEL GUZMAN, LIDOSHKA SERVED JAN-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AJPOP, ADELA
